emotionalArcAchieved.startState: investigative focus — operative discipline, cataloguing, suppressing personal responses
emotionalArcAchieved.endState: curiosity and intimacy — first personal question asked without tactical justification
emotionalArcAchieved.pivotDescription: The coast question — Lirien asks what the stars looked like from Kaelith's childhood coast, recognizes mid-sentence that the question has no operational value, and cannot stop herself from wanting the answer

craftToolsApplied: T1 — Scene-Sequel structure: SCN-028 follows Goal→Conflict→Disaster; SCN-029 follows Reaction→Dilemma→Decision sequel; SCN-030 is intimate sequel
T5 — Subtext in dialogue: Lirien and Kaelith's strategic debate carries emotional subtext about trust and shared purpose
T12 — Information management: archive documents reveal conspiracy through pattern recognition, not exposition dumps
T14 — MRU structure: external stimulus → emotion → reflex → rational action → speech pattern maintained in archive scene
T15 — Foreshadowing: Thalen Reyvas named, Dimming rites schedule established, next rite location near Quietus approach
T16 — Mystery box: who within the High Conclave supports Reyvas? Why does someone want Ythara to wake?
T17 — Emotional throughline: Lirien's parenthetical assessments present in scenes 1-2, absent in scene 3
T18 — Symbolic motif deployment: MOT-001 Pallor as documented institutional damage, MOT-003 water metaphors throughout Lirien's POV
T20 — Pacing variation: high-tension archive infiltration → medium-tension strategic debate → low-tension intimate conversation
T21 — Micro-tension: every passage maintains at least one active tension source (detection risk, conspiracy scope, emotional vulnerability)
T22 — Hook and close: chapter opens with population observation (Lirien's operative eye), closes with intimate-quiet sleep
T24 — Voice differentiation: Lirien's operative vocabulary, parenthetical assessments, water metaphors distinct from Kaelith's architectural framework

continuityNotes.characterPositions: Lirien and Kaelith camped 2 miles NE of Aranthem, continuing toward the Quietus
newInformation: Thalen Reyvas (High Conclave, Seventh Seat) identified as 40-year Dimming rites orchestrator
Dimming rites follow astronomical schedule aligned with membrane permeability peaks
Next rite approximately 3 weeks away, near Dawnward Range / Quietus approach
Monitoring stations systematically decommissioned to hide Pallor thinning
Conspiracy is ideological — someone wants Ythara to wake
foreshadowingPlanted: Thalen Reyvas name — payoff in Act III confrontation
Dimming rites schedule — payoff when next rite occurs near Quietus
Ideological motivation — question of WHY someone wants Ythara awake remains open
motifAppearances: MOT-001: Pallor described through archived documents as degrading membrane, institutional measurements of its decay
MOT-003: Water/infiltration/surface-depth throughout — investigation as infiltration, truth as undercurrent, intimacy as permeability, the coast conversation as literal water memory

informationAsymmetry.LirienKnows_KaelithDoesNot: Full contents of waystation sealed documents (partially resolved — Kaelith now knows Reyvas name but Lirien revealed she had it earlier than disclosed)
informationAsymmetry.SharedKnowledge: Thalen Reyvas identity, Dimming rites conspiracy scope, strategic decision to prioritize Quietus
informationAsymmetry.ReaderKnows: Lirien's internal emotional state — the parenthetical system failing, the unclassifiable feelings around Kaelith

keyCharacterDevelopment.CHAR-002: First personal question without tactical value. Parenthetical assessment system goes silent around Kaelith for the first time. Acknowledges wanting to know Kaelith as a person. Falls asleep without establishing watch rotation — surrender of vigilance.
keyCharacterDevelopment.CHAR-001: Shares childhood memories of the coast — vulnerability through personal history. Observes Lirien's briefing-protocol-recitation habit with patience. Uses humor to invite deeper conversation.

SCN-028.to: conspiracy has documented history and institutional protection

SCN-029.to: we must expose the saboteur or reaching the seal is meaningless — but Quietus first

SCN-030.to: we are people having a conversation because we want to

chapterStart.CHAR-002: investigative focus, operative discipline, carrying the weight of withheld intelligence
chapterStart.CHAR-001: steady, mission-oriented, carrying suspicion about Reyvas

chapterEnd.CHAR-002: guarded openness — operative armor breached by personal curiosity, classification system failing, choosing proximity
chapterEnd.CHAR-001: vulnerable through shared memory — offered childhood without being asked for it, accepted intimacy
